notes: Codex had implementation and verification capability.
Agy was rejected because no prototype task was needed.

lessons: Keep implementation and review receipts separate.
Record rejected prototype candidates when the task does not need exploration.
next_routing_hints: Use Codex for source edits only when current tools and context budget are verified.
Use Claude for read-only review when expected review evidence is declared.
privacy_notes: No secrets or hidden transcripts are stored; evidence paths only.
